system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_dinhmuc_son_getall","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MES_DINHMUC_SON_GETALL](@masp nvarchar(50), @masp_mausac nvarchar(50))
AS
--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(50), @masp_mausac nvarchar(50)
--SET @masp = '800 030'
--SET @masp_mausac = 'AKZ001'

DECLARE @stt nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @buoc nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @mavt nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @chitiet nvarchar(MAX)
DECLARE @sl_m2 float

DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR
  SELECT stt, buoc, mact, tenct , soluong 
  FROM tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau
  WHERE mamau = @masp_mausac
  ORDER BY stt, buoc
OPEN cur
FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @stt, @buoc, @mavt, @chitiet, @sl_m2
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
  IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM mes_dinhmuc_son WHERE masp = @masp AND masp_mausac = @masp_mausac AND mavt = @mavt AND buoc = @buoc AND stt = @stt)
  BEGIN
    -- UPDATE
    UPDATE mes_dinhmuc_son
    SET sl_m2 = @sl_m2,
        sl_sp = m2 * @sl_m2
    WHERE masp = @masp 
      AND masp_mausac = @masp_mausac 
      AND mavt = @mavt 
      AND buoc = @buoc 
      AND stt = @stt
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
    -- INSERT
    INSERT INTO mes_dinhmuc_son 
    (
      stt, masp, masp_mausac, buoc,
      mavt, chitiet, m2, sl_m2,
      sl_sp, sontrongsanpham, hoanthanh,
      ngaytao, nguoitao, ngaysua, nguoisua
    )
    VALUES
    (
      @stt, @masp, @masp_mausac, @buoc,
      @mavt, @chitiet, 0, @sl_m2,
      0, 0, 0, GETDATE(), NULL, NULL, NULL
    )
  END
  FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @stt, @buoc, @mavt, @chitiet, @sl_m2
END
CLOSE cur
DEALLOCATE cur

SELECT A.*, B.mota, B.dvt
FROM mes_dinhmuc_son A
  INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
WHERE A.masp = @masp AND A.masp_mausac = @masp_mausac
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(stt) = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ,LEN(stt),stt, buoc, t_sort","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.mes_dinhmuc_son"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
